content.json:
# 💰 Azure Landing Zone Cost Analysis Dashboard

Real-time cost tracking, budgets, and optimization recommendations.

content.query:
CostManagementQuery
| where TimeGenerated > startofmonth(now())
| summarize TotalCost=sum(PreTaxCost)
| extend CostUSD=round(TotalCost, 2), EstimatedMonthlyTotal=round(TotalCost * (day(endofmonth(now()))/day(now())), 2)
content.title: Current Month Spending

content.query:
CostManagementQuery
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| summarize MonthlyCost=sum(PreTaxCost) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| project TimeGenerated, Cost=round(MonthlyCost, 2)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Cost Trend (90 Days)

content.query:
CostManagementQuery
| where TimeGenerated > startofmonth(now())
| summarize CostByService=sum(PreTaxCost) by ServiceName
| top 10 by CostByService desc
| project ServiceName, Cost=round(CostByService, 2), Percentage=round((CostByService/sum(CostByService))*100, 1)
content.title: Top 10 Services by Cost

content.query:
AzureAdvisor
| where Category == 'Cost'
| where Impact == 'High' or Impact == 'Medium'
| top 10 by EstimatedSavings desc
| project Recommendation, EstimatedSavings=round(EstimatedSavings, 2), Impact, ResourceGroup
content.title: High Impact Opportunities

content.query:
CostManagementBudget
| project BudgetName, BudgetLimit, CurrentSpend=round(CurrentMonthSpend, 2), Remaining=round(BudgetLimit - CurrentMonthSpend, 2), PercentUsed=round((CurrentMonthSpend/BudgetLimit)*100, 1)
| order by PercentUsed desc
content.title: Budget Status

content.query:
CostManagementQuery
| where TimeGenerated > startofmonth(now())
| summarize CostByRG=sum(PreTaxCost) by ResourceGroup
| top 20 by CostByRG desc
| project ResourceGroup, Cost=round(CostByRG, 2)
content.title: Cost by Resource Group
